info.name: Hospital Management System — Ultimate Audit
info.description: Complete test suite for the HMS Backend API. 10 module folders · 80+ endpoints · JWT auto-capture on login. Set base_url = http://localhost:5000/api/v1 before running.

variable.description: Auto-populated by the Login request test script.

item.name: Auth

exec: console.log('Token saved to collection variable: token');
console.error('Login failed or token missing:', json.message);

request.description: Logs in and automatically saves the JWT to the `token` collection variable.
Fetches full user record including PasswordHash. Params: Username=dr.smith

item.description: User account management, JWT login with auto token capture, and audit logging.

request.description: Returns doctor fields joined with Employee fields (Name, Phone, Email, Salary, etc.).
Returns all doctors with full Employee details via SQL JOIN. The key integration test.
Returns TotalEmployees, TotalDoctors, TotalNurses, TotalStaff in a single query.

item.description: Full HR management including JOIN-powered detail endpoints and system-wide aggregate counts.

request.description: Counts active admissions (DischargeDate IS NULL) for this room. Real-time occupancy check.
Search filter: returns all appointments for a given PatientID.
Search filter: returns all appointments assigned to a given DoctorID (EmployeeID).
Permanently removes an appointment record. Use with caution.
Hard delete. Will fail if a LabReport references this TestID due to FK constraint.
Returns the single report associated with a given TestID (1-to-1 relationship).
